title: SpecVerse Unified Schema v3.5.0
description: Unified schema for SpecVerse specifications, manifests, and instance factories. Supports components (WHAT), deployments (WHERE), and manifests (HOW) with instance-based technology mapping.

oneOf.$comment: Specification file (.specly) - contains components and/or deployments
Standalone manifest file (manifest.yaml) - maps deployment instances to instance factories
Instance factory definition (e.g., fastify-prisma.yaml) - reusable technology specification

NamespaceString.description: Namespace: @org/package, @org/domain/module, unscoped package (kebab-case), or component name (PascalCase)

oneOf.description: Convention format: Type, Type[], or Array<Type> with modifiers (required, optional, unique, etc.)

steps.description: Sequential steps describing the execution process

constraints.description: Behavioural conventions that expand into Quint invariants. Example: 'models must have attributes'

ExportSection.description: What this component exports for others to import

profiles.description: Profiles currently attached to this model (runtime state)

ProfileAttachmentSection.description: Configuration for profile attachment - defines which models this profile can attach to

profiles.description: List of model types this profile can attach to

conditions.description: Optional conditions for when this profile should attach

priority.description: Attachment priority when multiple profiles compete

ModelMetadataSpec.description: Metadata configuration for models - generates common synthetic attributes (id, audit, softDelete, labels, status, version)

oneOf.description: Single field to use as display label
Multiple fields to combine for display label

label.description: Field(s) to use as display label in UIs

oneOf.description: Enable audit fields with defaults (createdAt, updatedAt)

userNames.description: Custom names for user tracking fields

audit.description: Enable audit fields (timestamps + optional user tracking)

oneOf.description: Enable soft delete with defaults (deletedAt, isDeleted)

fieldNames.description: Custom names for soft delete fields

softDelete.description: Enable soft delete (mark as deleted instead of hard delete)

oneOf.description: Lifecycle name to derive status field from

status.description: Status field configuration (from lifecycle or explicit values)

oneOf.description: Enable versioning with defaults (integer version field)

PrimitivesSection.description: Custom primitive definitions with validation rules

oneOf.description: Convention syntax: 'String pattern=regex values=[a,b] min=0 max=100'

PrimitiveDefinition.description: Full primitive definition with validation rules

previousVersions.description: Previous schema versions for compatibility tracking

type.description: View type/category. Standard types: page, list, detail, form, dashboard, modal, dialog, drawer, wizard, split. Custom types allowed (camelCase).

export.description: Whether this view is exported for reuse

uiComponents.description: UI components within this view (visual elements like tables, forms, buttons)

capabilities.description: Capabilities available on this communication channel

replication.description: Minimum number of data replicas required (logical requirement)

policies.description: Security policy names to enforce (logical requirement)

healthCheck.description: Whether health checking is required (logical requirement)

loadBalancing.description: Whether load balancing is required (logical requirement)

ManifestDefinition.description: Implementation manifest - maps deployment instances to instance factories

deploymentName.description: Name of deployment in the spec

defaultMappings.description: Default instance factory by category (lowest priority)

capabilityMappings.description: Map capabilities to instance factories with pattern matching (medium priority)

instanceFactories.description: List of instance factories used by this manifest.

ManifestImportSection.description: Import standard definition libraries for implementation types

alias.description: Optional alias for the imported library

ManifestComponentReference.description: Information about the v3.1.0 Component specification

componentVersion.description: Version constraint for the component (should be ^3.1.0)

ManifestDeploymentReference.description: Information about the v3.1.0 Deployment specification

deploymentVersion.description: Version constraint for the deployment (should be ^3.1.0)

CapabilityMappingsSection.description: v3.1.0 capability mappings using implementation types

InstanceFactoryDefinition.description: Instance factory definition - reusable technology specification for deployment instances

category.description: Which deployment instance category this implements

capabilities.description: What this instance provides and requires

runtime.description: Runtime environment identifier. Standard runtimes: node, deno, bun, python, rust, go, browser. See SpecVerse Registry for complete list.
runtime.$comment: Validation: Linter checks against SpecVerse runtime registry

language.description: Programming language identifier (kebab-case). Standard languages: typescript, javascript, python, rust, go, java, csharp, php, ruby, kotlin, swift. See SpecVerse Registry for complete list.
language.$comment: Validation: Linter checks against SpecVerse language registry

additionalProperties.description: Additional tech-specific fields (e.g., orm, validation, cache)

outputPattern.description: Output file path pattern with variables

configurationSchema.description: Optional JSON Schema to validate configuration overrides

extends.description: Parent instance type to extend from

requirements.description: Generic requirements declared by this implementation type for scaffolding (runtime-agnostic structure)

dependencies.description: Package/library dependencies (structure varies by runtime: npm, pip, cargo, go-mod, etc.)

configuration.description: Build/runtime configuration files (structure varies by runtime: tsconfig, pyproject, cargo-toml, etc.)

path.description: File path relative to project root

description.description: Description of what this file is for

ViewComponent.description: Individual UI component within a view

options.description: Options for select/dropdown components (strings or {label, value} objects)

OperationPolicies.description: Deployment-specific operational policies for an operation

readOnly.description: Mark transaction as read-only for optimization

keyField.description: Parameter field to use as idempotency key

ttlSeconds.description: How long to remember idempotency keys

keyFields.description: Parameter fields to include in cache key

retryableErrors.description: Error types/codes that should trigger retry

failureThreshold.description: Number of failures before opening circuit

successThreshold.description: Number of successes before closing circuit

timeoutMs.description: Operation timeout before considering it a failure

halfOpenAfterMs.description: Time to wait before attempting half-open state
